title: API events: fix parsing error
body:
Fix an error where an absent "filters" parameter led to JSON parsing
errors.

Fixes: #7078
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I am under the impression that the tests in `test/api2/rest_api` are not executed. They should have caught the regression but didn't and I couldn't find any wiring in the CI.
Added a test the apiv2 test to prevent future regressions.
